title: Leaseholders - have your say on service charge reform! - Liz Kendall MP - Liz Kendall
h1: Leaseholders – have your say on service charge reform!
text_excerpt: Leaseholders - have your say on service charge reform! - Liz Kendall MP - Liz Kendall Skip to main content Liz Kendall Working hard for Leicester West Join Get Involved Donate About My Role Local News National News Parliamentary Business Contact Other help and advice Archive More Menu 9th July, 2025 Leaseholders – have your say on service charge reform! Are you a leaseholder fed up with unclear, excessive service charges? This Labour Government is acting. Have your say in our consultation to deliver stronger rights and fairer charges for nearly 5 million leaseholders. https://www.gov.uk/government/consultations/strengthening-leaseholder-protections-over-charges-and-services-consultation Liz Kendall Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Sarah Russell on behalf of Liz Kendall, all at Unite the Union, East Midlands Region, Friars Mill, Riverside Building, 102 Bath Lane, Leicester LE3 5BJ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
